headline: Corpay Completes Sale of Vehicle Payments Asset
summary: ATLANTA, April 06, 2026--Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), the corporate payments company, today announced it has completed the sale of PayByPhone, its mobile parking payments business, to Lightyear Capital.

raw.headline: Corpay Completes Sale of Vehicle Payments Asset
